title: selliguea minor
intro: Selliguea minor, also known as Polypodium pellucidum, is a type of fern native to tropical regions of Asia and the Pacific Islands. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to heal wounds and reduce pain. The health benefits of Selliguea minor include its ability to lower blood pressure, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. In herbal preparations, the leaves of Selliguea minor are often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, and are also used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments.
